title: Decodie Config
description: Schema for .decodie/config.json — user preferences for the Decodie.

user_experience_level.description: The user's self-assessed experience level. Controls default filtering and explanation depth.

preferred_topics.description: Topics the user wants to see more often.

excluded_topics.description: Topics the user wants to hide from default views.

archival_threshold_days.description: Number of days after which entries are suggested for archival.

auto_suggest_archival.description: Whether to automatically suggest archiving stale entries.

show_external_docs.description: Whether to display external documentation links in entry views.

default_view.description: Which view to show by default when listing entries.

sessions_visible_by_default.description: Number of recent sessions to display in the session view.

api_key.description: Anthropic API key (sk-ant-api03-...) for the Q&A feature. If not set, falls back to Claude Code CLI. Optional.

api_model.description: Claude model identifier for the Q&A feature. Optional.
